services.name: Fire Alarm Inspection
services.description: Comprehensive inspection and testing of fire alarm panels, initiating devices, notification appliances, and backup power to ensure code compliance.

services.name: Fire Extinguisher Inspection & Maintenance
services.description: Annual inspection, recharge, and hydrostatic testing services for portable fire extinguishers across all hazard classes.

services.name: CCTV System Installation
services.description: Design, installation, and configuration of CCTV camera kits and NVR/DVR systems for warehouses, offices, and retail spaces.

services.name: Security System Remote Monitoring
services.description: 24/7 remote monitoring subscription for intrusion alarms, panic buttons, and integrated security sensors.

services.name: Emergency Lighting & Exit Sign Inspection
services.description: Testing and documenting performance of emergency lighting units and exit signs, including battery backup verification.

shipping_methods.name: Standard Shipping
shipping_methods.description: Economical ground shipping for all eligible products, including medical supplies and safety equipment.

shipping_methods.name: Expedited Shipping
shipping_methods.description: Faster shipping option for urgent orders such as replacement AED pads or critical PPE.

shipping_methods.name: Overnight Shipping
shipping_methods.description: Next-business-day delivery for time-sensitive emergency equipment orders placed before the daily cutoff.

shipping_methods.name: Warehouse Pickup
shipping_methods.description: No-cost pickup from the central warehouse for local customers with pre-arranged collection times.

products.name: WorkSafe 50-Person Workplace First Aid Kit
products.description: Wall-mountable workplace first aid kit suitable for up to 50 employees, stocked to meet common OSHA recommendations for offices, light industrial, and retail environments.
features: Workplace first aid kit for up to 50 people
Includes bandages, antiseptics, burn care, and eye wash
Refillable and organized with labeled compartments

products.name: ProGuard Workplace First Aid Station - 75-Person
products.description: Two-shelf workplace first aid station designed for medium-sized facilities, with clearly labeled refill packs and critical trauma supplies.
features: Ideal for offices and warehouses up to 75 employees
Durable steel cabinet with lockable door
Includes CPR mask and trauma dressings

products.name: OSHA-Compliant Metal Cabinet First Aid Kit - 100-Person
products.description: Large-capacity metal first aid cabinet pre-stocked to support up to 100 employees, suitable for manufacturing, logistics, and large office sites.
features: Meets common OSHA and ANSI first aid guidelines
Includes eye wash, burn care, and trauma supplies

products.name: Lifeline AED Semi-Automatic Defibrillator
products.description: Semi-automatic AED with clear voice prompts, status indicator, and robust carry handle, ideal for offices, gyms, and schools.
features: Rugged design for public access locations
Compatible with adult and pediatric pads

products.name: Lifeline AED Lightweight Defibrillator with Battery
products.description: Lightweight AED with intuitive icon-based interface, designed for rapid deployment in workplaces and community facilities.
features: Lightweight, compact AED for easy wall or cabinet mounting
Clear visual and voice prompts for rescuers
Ideal for offices, schools, and fitness centers

products.name: RescueLine AED Defibrillator (No Battery Included)
products.description: Cost-effective AED base unit supplied without battery or pads, ideal as a spare device for organizations with existing accessories.
features: AED base unit sold without battery or pads
Suitable as a backup unit for trained facilities

products.name: SafeGuard CO2 Fire Extinguisher - 5 lb
products.description: 5 lb carbon dioxide (CO2) fire extinguisher suitable for energized electrical equipment and flammable liquid hazards in industrial and commercial settings.
features: Rated for Class B and C fires
Ideal for server rooms and mechanical spaces

products.name: SafeGuard ABC Fire Extinguisher - 10 lb
products.description: 10 lb multi-purpose ABC dry chemical fire extinguisher for offices, warehouses, and light industrial facilities.
features: Rated for Class A, B, and C fires
Heavy-duty vehicle or wall bracket included

products.name: SafeGuard ABC Fire Extinguisher - 5 lb
products.description: 5 lb multi-purpose ABC fire extinguisher suited for offices, break rooms, and light-duty commercial applications.
features: Meets common code requirements for offices

products.name: SecureVision 8-Camera 4K NVR CCTV Kit
products.description: Complete 8-camera 4K IP CCTV kit with 8-channel NVR, suitable for medium warehouses, offices, and retail stores.
features: Remote viewing via SecureVision mobile app
Ideal for warehouses and office complexes

products.name: SecureVision 4-Camera 1080p DVR Kit
products.description: Entry-level 4-camera DVR-based CCTV kit for small offices and retail shops.
features: Hybrid DVR with mobile viewing app
Coax cabling and power supplies included
Ideal for small shops and back offices

products.name: SecureVision Smart Alarm Starter Kit
products.description: Smart intrusion alarm starter kit with hub, keypad, door/window sensors, and motion detector, controllable via mobile app.
features: Smart hub with cellular and Wi-Fi connectivity
Control and alerts via SecureVision mobile app
Includes keypad, 4 door/window sensors, 1 motion detector
Expandable with additional sensors and sirens
Ideal for small offices and retail suites

products.name: SecureVision Smart Alarm Plus Kit
products.description: Expanded smart alarm kit with additional sensors and internal siren, supporting app control and integration with CCTV.
features: Includes hub, keypad, 8 door/window sensors, 2 motion detectors
Mobile notifications for arm/disarm and alarms
Designed for larger offices and warehouses

products.name: SecureVision Wireless Alarm Kit (Non-Smart)
products.description: Wireless alarm kit with local siren and keypad, without mobile app connectivity, ideal for budget-conscious installations.

products.name: TrailSafe Compact Hiking First Aid Kit
products.description: Lightweight, water-resistant first aid kit designed for day hikes and backpacking, with blister care, bandages, and emergency supplies.
features: Weighs under 2 lb for easy pack carry
Includes blister care and wound cleaning supplies
Ideal for hiking, camping, and travel

products.name: Mountain Hiker Extended First Aid Kit
products.description: Extended-capacity hiking and trekking first aid kit with additional trauma supplies and survival items.
features: Includes elastic bandages and splint material
Slightly heavier for added supply capacity
Not suitable for under-2-lb weight filters

products.name: PureTouch Nitrile Exam Gloves - Medium, Box of 100
products.description: Powder-free nitrile examination gloves in size Medium, providing excellent barrier protection for medical and industrial use.

products.name: PureTouch Nitrile Exam Gloves - Large, Box of 100
products.description: Powder-free nitrile examination gloves in size Large for clinical and facility use.
features: Suitable for healthcare and janitorial applications

products.name: PureTouch Latex Exam Gloves - Medium, Box of 100
products.description: Traditional latex examination gloves in size Medium, offering high tactile sensitivity.
features: Excluded when filtering for nitrile material

products.name: ArmorShield Tactical Vest Level IIIA
products.description: Concealable soft armor vest rated to NIJ Level IIIA, suitable for security guards and executive protection details.
features: NIJ Level IIIA soft armor protection
Available in Medium, Large, and X-Large sizes
Under $300 per vest for budget-conscious agencies
